title: Reviewer package for public-subset cross-dataset validation and calibration transfer of chest radiograph classification models
description: Code, configuration files, derived metadata, patient-level split files, prediction CSVs, metric tables, manuscript-ready figures, package-version records, training logs, and optional model checkpoint archive for the selected-public-subset NIH ChestX-ray14 to VinDr-CXR validation study. Raw NIH ChestX-ray14 and VinDr-CXR images are not redistributed and must be obtained from the original dataset providers.
notes: Before publication, replace placeholders with real author metadata and confirm the code/data licence. Do not apply this repository licence to third-party public datasets. If checkpoint files are included, confirm that trained-weight redistribution is permitted.
